error_signature: UI displays the wrong item after deletion
title: UI shows incorrect item after deletion
symptom: After deleting a record at a specific index, the UI incorrectly displays the last record instead of the intended one.
applies_when: Deleting a record from an array
not_this_if: The deletion works correctly in the backend
No binding issues with the input
root_cause: The UI may not be properly bound to the data model, causing it to display stale or incorrect data after an operation like deletion. This can happen if the input field is not correctly linked to the data source that reflects the current state of the array.
fix_steps: Check the binding of the input field to the data model
Ensure that the input is correctly linked to the context.item.data.amount
Test the deletion again to see if the UI updates correctly
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the binding of the input field to the data model to ensure the UI reflects the correct state after deletion.
